[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100101 3
1 1001100 3
2 0101001 3
3 1101110 5
4 0011010 3
5 0010010 2
6 0011010 3
7 1100111 5

01 10 0010010 2 match 5
12 21 0000010 1
23 32 0100101 3 match 0
34 43 0000100 1
45 54 0001000 1
56 65 0101000 2
67 76 0001010 2
70 07 0010010 2 match 5

02 20 0000010 1
13 31 0000000 a
24 42 1000100 2
35 53 0100001 2
46 64 1001100 3 match 1
57 75 0001000 1
60 06 0000010 1
71 17 0011010 3 match 4 6

03 30 0000000 a
14 41 0001000 1

47 74 0001000 1
50 05 0000000 a
61 16 0001010 2
72 27 0000010 1
